title: Exploring Bodrum Castle and Marina
description: A themed day in Muğla: Bodrum Castle, Bodrum Marina, Bazaar, Espressolab Bodrum Marina.
notes: Kick off your day at the castle museum with underwater archaeology.
Take a stroll along the shore amidst the yachts.
Wander through the white streets lined with begonvilles.
Take a break by the sea with a coffee.
Free public restrooms near the marina.
